overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village at sunset. The character moves from narrow cobblestone streets through a village square with a central well, past villagers and a horse, and into darker covered market areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with timber-framed medieval houses

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through the narrow village street with two swords on his back

notable_agents.action: villager in red shirt walking ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: medieval half-timbered house with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
medieval house with stone foundation and wooden upper structure
rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
uneven cobblestone path winding through the village

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow cobblestone street lined with medieval timber-framed houses. The orange sunset sky is visible between the buildings, casting long shadows across the path. A villager in a red shirt walks ahead, and wooden fences line the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with central stone well

events.description: passing through stone archway into open village square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the archway into the bustling village square

notable_agents.action: villager in red dress standing near the well

entered.detail: stone archway marking the entrance to the village square
circular stone well with wooden roof structure
wooden market stall with canvas canopy

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through a stone archway into a more open village square. A large stone well with a wooden roof stands prominently on the right, while market stalls line the left side. The lighting becomes more diffused as the sun sets, and more villagers are visible walking through the square.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with horse and market activity

events.description: Geralt maneuvers around a horse standing in the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through the square past villagers and maneuvering around a horse

notable_agents.action: brown horse standing in the path being tended by a villager

entered.detail: wooden cart with wheels parked beside the path
low stone wall with moss growing on the surface
large wooden gate with metal reinforcements at the far end of the square

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through the village square, passing a wooden cart and navigating around a brown horse standing in the path. A stone wall runs along the right side, and a large wooden gate is visible ahead. The square remains busy with villagers going about their activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market passage with wooden stalls

events.description: entering darker alleyway with significantly reduced sunlight
entering covered wooden market structure with overhead roof

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the dimly lit alley and into the covered market area

notable_agents.action: villager in blue dress walking opposite direction

entered.detail: covered wooden market structure with overhead beams and roof
wooden market stall with goods displayed on counters
wooden roof structure covering the market passage

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a darker alleyway where the sunlight fades significantly, then moves into a covered wooden market structure. The space becomes enclosed with wooden beams overhead and market stalls lining the sides. A stone wall now appears on the left, and the lighting shifts to low artificial ambiance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval village that transitions from sun-drenched cobblestone streets into a dim, enclosed market. It begins by following Geralt through a narrow lane of timber-framed houses, where an orange sunset casts long shadows across the path and wooden fences. As the camera passes through a stone archway, the environment opens into a bustling village square featuring a prominent stone well and various market stalls under a diffusing light. The movement continues past a wooden cart and a brown horse standing in the path before turning toward a large wooden gate. Finally, the scene shifts from the open square into a dark alleyway and a covered wooden market structure, where the sunlight fades completely in favor of low artificial ambiance beneath heavy overhead beams.
